zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，等待确认反弹
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD围绕69.57窄幅整理，价格略低于20日均线70.24，说明短线仍受均线压制。24小时波动极小，市场缺乏方向，整体偏向震荡整理，尚未形成明确反转信号。

MACD为-0.7229，动能仍在零轴下方，空头优势尚未完全消退。RSI暂缺，但结合价格贴近日内低点69.48来看，买盘接力不足，反弹更像技术修复而非趋势扭转。

下方支撑先看69.40一线，若失守，68.80附近可能成为下一道防线；上方阻力首看70.24，其次是71.20和72.00。只有有效站稳20日均线，才有机会打开更强反弹空间。

操作上建议以观望或轻仓试多为主，等待放量突破70.24后再顺势跟进；若价格跌破69.40，应及时减仓并设置止损。短线仍以区间交易思路处理，避免追涨杀跌。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 69.57, slightly below the 20-period simple moving average at 70.24, suggesting short-term bearish pressure remains intact. The narrow intraday range between 69.48 and 69.65 indicates a consolidation phase after previous downward momentum. With price unable to reclaim the moving average, sellers still maintain a modest advantage, although the limited 24-hour decline of 0.09% shows that bearish conviction is currently weak rather than aggressive.

The technical indicators offer a cautious outlook. The MACD reading at -0.7229 remains in negative territory, signaling that momentum has yet to fully recover. Without a positive crossover confirmation, traders should assume the prevailing trend is neutral-to-bearish. The absence of an RSI reading limits overbought or oversold assessment, making price action and moving averages more important in the current environment. Market participants should watch whether momentum begins flattening, which could precede a reversal attempt.

Key support is forming around 69.40 to 69.50, which aligns closely with the recent session low. A break beneath this zone could expose downside targets near 68.80 and potentially 68.00 if selling accelerates. On the upside, immediate resistance sits around the SMA level at 70.24, followed by a stronger resistance area between 71.00 and 71.50. A sustained move above 70.24 would be an early indication that buyers are regaining control of short-term direction.

From a trading perspective, conservative traders may prefer to wait for confirmation before opening new positions. Bullish entries become more attractive if SOL/USD closes decisively above 70.24 with increasing volume, targeting the 71.00-72.00 region. Meanwhile, short-term bearish traders could consider opportunities if price repeatedly fails at resistance while maintaining disciplined stop losses above 71.50. Given the compressed price range and mixed signals, a breakout strategy may currently offer a better risk-to-reward profile than attempting to anticipate the next directional move.
